section_name: No repeal of motor vehicle laws
text: This article shall in no respect be considered as a repeal of the provisions of the state motor vehicle laws, but shall be construed as supplemental thereto.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 7. Motor Vehicle Fin. Responsibility Law
##### § 42-7-508 — No repeal of motor vehicle laws

This article shall in no respect be considered as a repeal of the provisions of the state motor vehicle laws, but shall be construed as supplemental thereto.

subsections.text: This article shall in no respect be considered as a repeal of the provisions of the state motor vehicle laws, but shall be construed as supplemental thereto.
